---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or enhancement
title: "[feat]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Component / Feature
Name of the component or feature you'd like to see.

## Category
Which category does it belong to?
- [ ] Core primitive (Button, Input, etc.)
- [ ] AI component (Chat, Agent, Streaming)
- [ ] Crypto component (DeFi, Wallet, Trading)
- [ ] Data visualization (Charts, Tables)
- [ ] Effect / Pattern (Glassmorphism, Layout)

## Use Case
Describe the specific AI or crypto use case this would address.

## Design Reference
If possible, link to a design reference, similar component from another library, or describe the visual appearance.

## API Idea (optional)

```tsx
// What the ideal component API would look like
<MyNewComponent
  prop1="value"
  prop2={handler}
/>
```

## Additional Context
Any other information about the feature request.
